violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2026

The floors in the ware washing area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026
Inspector observed exposed insulation in the back kitchen area. Ceilings must be constructed of materials that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026
The wall in the mop sink area is in poor repair, inspector observed large hole. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
